tools.name: helkin_health_check
tools.description: Returns HelkinSwarm system health, active session count, and version.

tools.name: helkin_list_skills
tools.description: Lists all active skills, their domains, tool counts, and risk levels.

tools.name: helkin_current_datetime
tools.description: Returns the current runtime date/time grounded from the host clock, using the user's saved timezone when available or an explicitly requested timezone override.

timezone.description: Optional IANA timezone override such as 'Europe/Amsterdam' or 'US/Eastern'.

tools.name: helkin_recent_requests
tools.description: Returns the user's most recent requests from active overseer session history stored in Cosmos-backed state.

count.description: Optional number of recent user requests to return (default: 2, max: 10).

tools.name: helkin_skill_search
tools.description: Discovery-only capability browser for installed skills and tools. Supports help, search, describe_group, describe_skill, describe_tool, list_domains, and list_groups. Use this to narrow the skill/tool universe before selecting execution tools.

command.description: Discovery operation to run. Use help for usage guidance.

groupId.description: Capability group id for command=describe_group (for example: 'outlook/mail-read').

skillLimit.description: Optional maximum number of matching skills to return for search (default: 5).

toolLimit.description: Optional maximum number of matching tools to return for search (default: 8).

tools.name: helkin_mcp_registry_search
tools.description: Read-only search over a synced local cache of official MCP Registry candidates. Supports help, search, status, and refresh. Use this to discover external MCP servers as onboarding candidates without blurring them with installed HelkinSwarm skills.

command.description: Registry discovery operation to run. Use help for usage guidance.

limit.description: Optional maximum number of candidates to return for search (default: 8).

includeDeprecated.description: Optional search flag to include deprecated candidates (default: true).

includeDeleted.description: Optional search flag to include deleted candidates (default: false).

forceRefresh.description: For command=search, force a full cache refresh before searching.

forceFull.description: For command=refresh, force a full cache rebuild instead of a normal freshness check.

tools.name: helkin_mcp_forge
tools.description: Create, approve, and inspect McpForge onboarding bundles for discovered MCP Registry candidates. Supports help, draft_candidate, approve_bundle, and inspect_bundle. Approval runs an MCP smoke test and can hot-reload the candidate locally into the running stamp.

command.description: McpForge operation to run. Use help for usage guidance.

candidateName.description: Exact MCP Registry server name for command=draft_candidate.

useCase.description: Optional intended HelkinSwarm use case to help the draft evaluation stay grounded.

tools.name: helkin_get_costs
tools.description: Returns current month Azure spend breakdown by resource. Requires Azure Cost Management access.

externalAutomationCapabilities.action: Budget alerts and anomaly detection via native Azure Cost Management

tools.name: helkin_test_confirmation
tools.description: Test tool for verifying the Adaptive Card confirmation flow. Returns a simple success message after approval.

tools.name: helkin_save_preferences
tools.description: Save user preferences collected during onboarding (name, communication style, proactiveness, language). Call this after gathering the user's preferences.

addressAs.description: How the user wants to be addressed (name, nickname, title)

tools.name: helkin_forget_skill
tools.description: Forget all stored memories for a specific skill domain. Use when user says 'forget everything about outlook' or similar.

tools.name: helkin_skill_catalog
tools.description: List all skill memory vaults with entry counts and last update times. Shows what the system remembers about each skill domain.

tools.name: helkin_uninstall_skill
tools.description: Check whether a skill can be safely uninstalled. Verifies no other installed skills depend on it (bidirectional dependency check). Returns 'blocked' with dependent list if removal would break dependents, or 'ready' with next steps if safe.

skillId.description: The skill domain to check for uninstall (e.g. 'outlook', 'github')

tools.name: helkin_install_skill
tools.description: Check installation readiness and onboarding steps for a skill. Returns dependency status, missing prerequisites, required external accounts, and ordered setup steps.

tools.name: helkin_whoami
tools.description: Return the current user's application role (owner or guest) and the list of privileged tools accessible to them. Use to explain what the current user can and cannot do.

shortDescription: System health, skill management, cost monitoring, and user preferences
orchestratorUseCases: discover which skill or tool should handle a broader user request
ground the current date/time from runtime context instead of guessing
recall the user's most recent requests from active session memory
inspect current runtime state or user role
manage installed skills and stored preferences
